title: Marqeta Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Beats Expectations
text: Marqeta 2024 Full Year Earnings Results. Full Year 2024 Financial Performance. Revenue: Marqeta reported net revenue of $507 million for the full year 2024. Gross Profit: Gross profit reached $352 million, representing a 7% year-over-year increase. Total Processing Volume: TPV was $291 billion for the full year 2024, an annual increase of 31%. Analyst Expectations vs. Actual Results: Revenue was in line with analyst estimates. More notably, earnings per share (EPS) surpassed analyst estimates by 66%. Fourth Quarter 2024 Performance: For Q4 specifically, Marqeta reported fourth-quarter 2024 revenue of $136 million, surpassing the forecast of $132.31 million. The company met its earnings per share (EPS) forecast of -$0.05. Forward Outlook: Analyst Forecasts: Looking ahead, Marqeta is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 59.4% and 13.7% per annum respectively.
